name: GT-orderunit
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-bridge-orderunit (proofs/lem-bridge-orderunit/, af: validated; status proved). The near-fixed algebra A=Im P, with unit 1 and inherited cone A_+ = A cap B(H)_+, is an order-unit space, and its order-unit norm ||a||_ou = inf{t>0: -t1<=a<=t1} coincides EXACTLY with the operator norm on A. (Exact: no eta error in the order/unit/norm structure.) Dimension-free; no complete positivity used.
